_comment: Worker-only MCP config. Loaded via `claude --mcp-config worker/mcp-config.json --strict-mcp-config` in pty-runner.js so the worker-spawned claude subprocess uses its OWN browser profile, isolated from any interactive Claude Code session Gideon may be running concurrently. Avoids 'Browser is already in use for ~/.dealhound-chrome-profile' deadlocks audited 2026-05-15. The user-scope MCP at ~/.dealhound-chrome-profile is left untouched so interactive scans keep their warm cookies.
